member.name: F:TokenNftTransfer.Serial
member.summary: The serial number of the NFT

member.name: F:TokenNftTransfer.IsApproved
member.summary: If true then the transfer is expected to be an approved allowance and the sender is expected to be the owner. The default is false.

member.name: M:TokenNftTransfer.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert a byte array to a token NFT transfer object.
member.returns: the converted token nft transfer object
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TokenNftTransfer.ToBytes
member.summary: Convert the token NFT transfer object to a byte array.
member.returns: the converted token NFT transfer object
